title: Opening for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Financial Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
